title: PublishedComponent
description: An arrangement of published UI elements.

key.description: The unique identifier for the component.

fileKey.description: The unique identifier of the Figma file that contains the component.

nodeId.description: The unique identifier of the component node within the Figma file.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the component.

description.description: The description of the component as entered by the publisher.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component was created.

updatedAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component was last updated.
